decisions.title_en: Microsoft unveils in-house coding model Project Polaris + open-sources Windows Agent Framework at Build 2026
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Build 2026 keynote today (6-2): Microsoft announces homegrown coding model Project Polaris to replace OpenAI/GPT in GitHub Copilot, open-sources Windows Agent Framework under MIT, Copilot Workspace GA.

decisions.title_en: Alphabet plans $80B equity raise for AI buildout, Berkshire Hathaway invests $10B
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. 6-1 Alphabet announces $80B equity offering for AI infra; Berkshire $10B private placement, deepening Buffett's AI bet.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic confidentially files for US IPO to beat OpenAI
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. 6-1 Anthropic confirms confidential SEC filing for IPO, after $965B Series H, ahead of OpenAI/SpaceX listings.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches dedicated robotics division to build humanoids, Tesla stock falls
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Altman posts over weekend launching OpenAI Robotics for humanoids; Tesla -3.57% Monday 6-1 on Optimus rivalry.

decisions.title_en: Florida AG sues OpenAI and Sam Altman, seeks personal liability over ChatGPT safety
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. 6-1 Florida AG Uthmeier files 83-page suit, first state to sue OpenAI, names Altman personally.

decisions.title_en: NVIDIA + Unitree launch Isaac GR00T reference humanoid robot (H2 Plus) for researchers
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. 6-1 at GTC Taipei NVIDIA picks Unitree H2 + Sharpa hands + Jetson Thor as first open humanoid reference design, plus Cosmos 3 world model.

decisions.title_en: Jensen Huang GTC Taipei keynote: Vera Rubin full production, Vera CPU, RTX Spark, agentic era
decisions.reason: Same GTC Taipei keynote already published 6-1 (N1X laptop chip / RTX Spark + Vera Rubin NVL72 mass production). Data-center recap (Vera CPU, 'useful AI has arrived') is the same event, no substantively new development.
